message:
fix(test): fix e2e test failures from log pollution and CLI behavior change

- Add --quiet flag to semantic/hybrid score tests to prevent INFO logs
  from polluting JSON output and breaking parse_search_results()
- Update test_missing_required_args to use explicit non-existent path
  since `xf index` now uses default paths when no argument provided

All 435 tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
